assertions.title: runtime/schema.ts is the single source of truth
evidenceSnippets: All z.object/z.discriminatedUnion constructor matches are confined to src/runtime/schema.ts and src/tools/schemas.ts.
src/tools/schemas.ts shows runtime-derived schema usage via alias pattern (as Runtime...) and .shape usage.

assertions.title: Tool arg schemas are derived from runtime schemas
evidenceSnippets: src/tools/schemas.ts imports from ../runtime/schema (both type and runtime imports).
Derivation/re-export markers present (as Runtime... and .shape lines).

assertions.title: Tool boundary parses exactly once
evidenceSnippets: Search in src/tools + src/runtime/transitions shows parse usage only through parseToolArgs at the tool boundary.
flow_run_complete_feature uses withParsedArgs(...) and forwards input to completeRun(session, input as WorkerResult) without local re-parse.
schema.parse occurs in parseToolArgs (runtime/application/tool-runtime.ts), called by withParsedArgs in src/tools/parsed-tool.ts.
